title: Carcinogenius
description: addon for oreganized which contains the april fools asbestos content
body:
![Rebound update banner](https://i.imgur.com/vE3SlyJ.png)
![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)
[![akliz ad](https://i.imgur.com/aD9X866.png)](https://www.akliz.net/galena)
![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)

## 📖 About:
On April 1st 2025, we released an update for Oreganized called Carcinogenius, in it we planned to add Asbestos, Bromine, Arsenic and other such materials to the mod with Asbestos being the starting point.
Since then we have gotten feedback that these materials can be dangerous in certain contexts so we pulled it out of the mod.
HOWEVER for your pleasure only, we decided to remake this into its own addon, so now you can keep asbestos in the game if you wish to play with it, yay!

![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)

# THIS MOD REQUIRES [BLUEPRINT](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)
# THIS MOD REQUIRES [OREGANIZED](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)
![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)
